data.summary: Minimal phase-1 regression surface is already split across init-claude-install, init-mcp-scope, and init-nondestructive: install uses real temp fixtures via createWerewolfFixtureRoot/createEmptyFixtureRoot; capability summary is asserted through initCommand.run with mocked console/TTY; non-destructive guards assert abort-or-skip semantics for bootstrap/forensic/custom skill/settings merge.

detectClientSupports marks CodexCLI as detected via ~/.codex or explicit clientPaths.codexCLI, but capabilities remain bootstrap=true,mcp=true,hook=false,skill=false; init summary hard-codes skill=false clients to Skill=manual and Follow-up=manual step required.

data.risk: init template lookup prefers repo-root templates from process.cwd(), so current uncommitted edits under templates/bootstrap/codex-AGENTS-header.md and templates/claude-skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md would be consumed by fab init; codex-AGENTS-header template itself is not currently wired into install flow.
